nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Olive-striped flycatcher
nodes.summary: Olive-striped flycatcher（Olive-striped flycatcher，学名 Mionectes galbinus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Panama, Peru, Trinidad, and Venezuela

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: fasciaticollis: from far southern Colombia's Putumayo Department south on the eastern slope of the Andes through Ecuador and Peru into extreme northwestern Bolivia The olive-striped flycatcher inhabits the interior and edges of humid forest, secondary forest, and plantations in the foothills and subtropical zone
